overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a rain-soaked neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player drives through covered underpasses, open city streets, and a commercial plaza with bright holographic advertisements, eventually slowing to navigate pedestrian areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with concrete walls

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through the covered underpass at moderate speed

entered.detail: tall concrete walls lining the right side of the underpass with vertical ribbed texture
red and white striped safety barriers along the road edge
rain-slicked asphalt road surface reflecting overhead lights

segments.scene_description: The segment shows first-person driving through a covered highway underpass with concrete walls and safety barriers. The road is wet from rain, reflecting the artificial overhead lighting. No pedestrians or other vehicles are present in this enclosed stretch.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with digital billboards and street lighting

events.description: exits covered underpass into open rainy city street with visible neon lighting
approaches intersection with crosswalk markings and traffic signals

agents.ego_description: navigating wet city streets, passing digital billboards and approaching intersections

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics on the left side of the road
tall street lamps casting light through the rain
white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the underpass into open city streets soaked by heavy rain. Digital billboards and street lights illuminate the scene with neon colors. The driver approaches an intersection with crosswalk markings while navigating the wet roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection and plaza entrance with overpass

events.description: turns at intersection following road markings and traffic signals
enters plaza area with parked vehicles and debris under overpass

agents.ego_description: making turns at intersections and slowing down while approaching the plaza area

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure spanning across the road ahead
abandoned or parked cars along the side of the plaza area
scattered garbage and debris accumulated on the wet ground

segments.scene_description: The driver navigates through urban intersections, turning onto roads that lead toward a plaza area beneath an overpass. Parked vehicles and accumulated debris become visible as the vehicle slows down, transitioning from main roads to a more enclosed urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza under overpass with parked cars and pedestrians

events.description: slows down significantly while navigating tight plaza space with obstacles
briefly stops and shifts camera perspective to survey surroundings

agents.ego_description: slowly maneuvering through the plaza area avoiding debris and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking across the plaza in front of the vehicle
standing near the vending machines on the right side

entered.detail: concrete staircase structure leading up to the overpass on the right
bright red automated vending machines against the wall
illuminated advertisement with purple and pink neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Driving slowly through a semi-covered plaza area beneath an overpass, navigating around parked cars and scattered debris. Pedestrians appear walking through the area, and the vehicle briefly stops around the 50-second mark, shifting perspective before continuing toward a covered commercial walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with holographic advertisements

events.description: enters covered commercial walkway with bright holographic neon lighting
continues crawling slowly through dense pedestrian commercial area

agents.ego_description: crawling slowly through the covered commercial walkway surrounded by pedestrians and bright ads

notable_agents.action: walking along the covered walkway in the same direction as the vehicle
browsing near the storefront displays on the left

entered.detail: tall illuminated pillar displaying rotating holographic advertisements with purple and blue glow
overhead roof structure covering the commercial pedestrian walkway
support pillars lining the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle crawling through a covered commercial walkway illuminated by bright holographic advertisements and neon lights. The area is moderately crowded with pedestrians walking and browsing storefronts. The vehicle moves at very low speed through this pedestrian-oriented space, surrounded by glowing purple and blue holographic displays.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a sterile, enclosed underpass into a vibrant, pedestrian-filled commercial plaza. It begins by gliding through a covered highway underpass with concrete walls and wet roads reflecting artificial overhead lights. As the vehicle exits the tunnel, the scene opens into rain-soaked city streets illuminated by neon billboards and street lights before turning through urban intersections toward a plaza beneath an overpass. The environment then shifts from open roads to a more cluttered space, slowing down to navigate around parked cars and scattered debris among emerging pedestrians. Finally, the camera crawls through a covered commercial walkway, where the lighting transforms into a dense glow of purple and blue holographic advertisements surrounding crowds of people.
